title: Ventas Confirms End of Proxy Contest Following Withdrawal of Nominations by Land & Buildings
text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Ventas, Inc. (NYSE: VTR) (“Ventas” or the “Company”) today confirmed that, with the 2022 Annual Meeting results imminent this week, Land & Buildings has withdrawn its nomination of proxy fight candidate Jonathan Litt, who Land & Buildings previously nominated to stand for election to the Ventas Board of Directors in connection with the Company's 2022 Annual Meeting of Stockholders, which is scheduled to be held virtually on April 27, 2022. Land & Buildings

title: Land & Buildings Issues Statement on Ventas
text: STAMFORD, Conn.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Land & Buildings Investment Management, LLC (together with its affiliates, “Land & Buildings”), a significant shareholder of Ventas, Inc. (NYSE: VTR) (“Ventas”, “VTR”, or the “Company”), today issued the following statement regarding its campaign at the Company: “During this campaign we have spoken with many Ventas shareholders who fundamentally agree with what we've identified as the problems at the Company, and with the solutions we are proposing to h

title: Why I'll Never Sell Ventas
text: Ventas cut its dividend in 2020, which was bad, but I'm not going to sell it because the REIT has too many positive qualities.

title: Ventas Announces First Quarter 2022 Earnings Release Date and Conference Call
text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Ventas, Inc. (NYSE: VTR) (“Ventas” or the “Company”) will issue its first quarter 2022 earnings release after the close of trading on the New York Stock Exchange on Thursday, May 5, 2022. A conference call to discuss those earnings will be held on Friday, May 6, 2022 at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time (9:00 a.m. Central Time). The dial-in number for the conference call is (888) 330-3576 (or +1 (646) 960-0672 for international callers), and the participant passcode is 7655497.

title: Proxy advisory firms urge Ventas investors to reject activist's bid for board seat
text: Proxy advisory firms Glass Lewis and Institutional Shareholders Services urged investors in healthcare real estate trust Ventas Inc to back management's director candidates and reject activist investment firm Land & Buildings' effort to win one board seat.

title: Proxy Advisory Firm Glass Lewis Recommends Ventas Shareholders Vote “FOR ALL” of Ventas's Highly Qualified Directors
text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Ventas, Inc. (NYSE: VTR) (“Ventas” or the “Company”) today announced that Glass, Lewis & Co., LLC (“Glass Lewis”), an independent proxy advisory firm, has recommended that shareholders vote “FOR ALL” of Ventas's 11 experienced directors on the WHITE proxy card in advance of the upcoming Annual Meeting of Stockholders (“Annual Meeting”) to be held on April 27, 2022. text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Ventas, Inc. (NYSE: VTR) (“Ventas” or the “Company”) today announced that the Independent Directors of the Board of Directors have sent a letter to shareholders in connection with its 2022 Annual Meeting of Stockholders, which is scheduled to be held virtually on April 27, 2022. title: Ventas Mails Letter to Shareholders Highlighting Highly Qualified Board Overseeing Superior Long-Term Shareholder Returns
text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Ventas, Inc. (NYSE: VTR) (“Ventas” or the “Company”) today announced that it has mailed a letter to shareholders in connection with its 2022 Annual Meeting of Stockholders, which is scheduled to be held virtually on April 27, 2022. The letter urges shareholders to vote the WHITE proxy card “FOR ALL” of Ventas's highly qualified directors. Shareholders of record as of March 21, 2022, are entitled to vote. title: Ventas Files Investor Presentation Highlighting Execution of Winning Strategy to Drive Continued Long-Term Value for All Shareholders
text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Ventas, Inc. (NYSE: VTR) (“Ventas” or the “Company”) today announced that it has filed an investor presentation with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission in connection with its 2022 Annual Meeting of Stockholders, which is scheduled to be held virtually on April 27, 2022. title: Ventas to Participate in Investor Meetings at Credit Suisse Healthcare REIT Summit
text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Ventas, Inc. (NYSE: VTR) (“Ventas” or the “Company”) announced today that management will participate in investor meetings at the Credit Suisse Healthcare REIT Summit (the “Credit Suisse Summit”) on April 5, 2022. Any Company written materials accompanying the presentation at the Credit Suisse Summit will be available on the Company's website the morning of April 5, 2022.
